question.text:
Dear Kieran & Joanne,
I've confirmed with Michael.
Please kindly assist in creating a new user ID for Belawam team to access our E-service website.

Thank you!

Best Regards,

Easton Si/司文东

Agency Management Department

Mobile: +86-187-5698-8480

E-mail: eastonsi@culines.com

Web: www.culines.com <http://www.culines.com/> 







发送时间: 2026年2月11日 16:30

抄送: Dylan Dong/CUL-CN/Agency Mgt <dylandong@culines.com>; Michael Zhao/CUL-PH <michaelzhao@culines.com>; Indani Zulfah <indani.zulfah@samudera.id>; #CUL Allegro Support <allegrosupport@culines.com>; Arif Khajapi <arifkhajapi@samudera.id>; Abdul Malik <mal

answer.text:
Forward to Agency Management Team.

 

Please kindly confirm whether we need to create a new office code for BELAWAN (IDBLW), if yes, please provide necessary informations for our creation (the attachment is for your reference).

In addition, please also help to check and confirm the user ID and his/her authorities requested in below.

Thanks & Best Regards!

Catherine KANG/康秀英
Business Analysis Manager
Digital & IT Department
E-mail: catherinekang@culines.com <mail
Web: www.culines.com <http://www.culines.com/> 



 


发送时间: 2026年2月24日 16:01

抄送: Easton SI/CUL-CN/Agency Mgt <eastonsi@culines.com>; Joanne Ding/CUL-CN/IT <joanneding@culines
